text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Arima Kinen. Satono Diamond has
her eye on three people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, who she has admired since
before starting at Tracen Academy. Tokai Teio,
McQueen's long-time rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, there's Kitasan Black, who she has always
dreamed of catching up to and overtaking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond vows to beat all of them and
make her dream come true!
